comment: Bundle baseline. Updated 2026-05-03 after the wiki picker + sandbox feature: per-call provider/model picker widget for delegate_wiki_ingest + delegate_wiki_lint, plus path-restricted VaultAdapter wrapper that limits both workflows to wiki/, externalAgentResults/, and wiki-inbox.md. The +50 KB delta comes from: ConfigBody phase UI in WikiWidget (provider/model selects, loading/error/api-key states, Start/Cancel), WikiWidgetController picker state machine (model cache, async load, validation), restrictedVaultAdapter wrapper proxying every VaultAdapter method with normalize+allow checks, ProviderOverride threading through IngestRunInput/LintRunInput + per-run buildWikiOverrideInvoker in main.ts, and the listModelsForProvider helper that constructs ephemeral providers for non-active kinds. Original wiki slice baseline (F01–F19) still ~95 KB. Followups: (a) lazy-load the picker UI behind a dynamic import gated on the awaiting_config phase, (b) lazy-load createProviderForKind for non-default providers, (c) revisit zod helper tree-shaking from the wiki slice. Cap restored to 30 KB for incremental additions on top of this baseline.
